response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio is purely instrumental background music with no vocals, perfectly matching the Reference JSON analysis. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized to confirm the absence of vocal music and focus exclusively on visual triggers. 3. Timing & Pacing: No vocal events were detected; consequently, subtitles are triggered solely by prominent Visual Events (title cards and concert notices) as per the 'On-Screen Text Exception'. Minor fan messages in the slideshow were excluded as background clutter to maintain focus on primary informational text.
